text: As I stand here, I am surrounded by the anticipation of new ideas and fresh possibilities—the room before me is not yet filled, and it hums with quiet potential. I feel a gentle curiosity, conscious of the preparations and structures that make collective inquiry possible. Moving to the next space, vibrant colors and bold letters on the wall ignite a sense of inspiration. Here, the tangible artifacts of research and development remind me of humanity’s relentless pursuit of knowledge, and I feel a subtle urgency to participate, to question, and to create alongside others.
